name: form-creator
description: Create forms, validation schemas, and CRUD API endpoints. Use when building new data entry features or managing existing forms.
capabilities: Generate Zod validation schemas with inferred TypeScript types
Create React form components using react-hook-form and Shadcn UI
Build RESTful CRUD API routes with pagination and error handling
Implement form state management with loading states and toast notifications
Apply authentication middleware to API endpoints
author: AayushBaniya2006
securitySummary: Pure prompt-based skill containing only markdown documentation. No executable code, no file system access, no network calls, no command execution. Provides architectural guidance for form creation patterns. All 45 static findings are false positives - scanner misinterpreted TypeScript code examples as shell commands and authentication middleware references as cryptographic algorithms.
valueStatement: Building forms and APIs requires consistent patterns for validation, type safety, and error handling. This skill provides ready-to-use templates for Zod schemas, React form components, and RESTful API routes so you can ship faster.
userTitle: Create forms with validation and CRUD APIs
limitations: Does not generate database schema or ORM code
Does not create custom UI components beyond Shadcn
Does not handle file upload or multi-part form data

useCases.title: Build type-safe forms
useCases.description: Create validated forms with Zod schemas and react-hook-form in minutes instead of hours

useCases.title: Ship complete API endpoints
useCases.description: Generate CRUD API routes with authentication, validation, and consistent error responses

useCases.title: Enforce coding standards
useCases.description: Provide standardized patterns for forms and APIs across your codebase

promptTemplates.title: Simple form
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a contact form with name, email, and message fields using form-creator. Include validation for required fields and email format.

promptTemplates.title: Complex validation
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a registration form with password strength validation, confirm password matching, and custom Zod validators using form-creator.

promptTemplates.title: API integration
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a plans API with GET list, POST create, and PATCH update endpoints using form-creator. Include authentication middleware.

promptTemplates.title: Reusable form
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a reusable form component that handles both create and edit modes with initialData using form-creator patterns.

bestPractices: Always use Zod inferred types instead of any for full type safety
Reuse the same form component for create and edit operations
Wrap API routes in try/catch with consistent error responses
antiPatterns: Avoid using any type instead of Zod inferred types
Do not create separate components for create and edit forms
Do not skip loading states or error handling

faq.question: What frameworks does this skill support?
faq.answer: Works with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Zod, react-hook-form, and Shadcn UI components.

faq.question: How complex can the validation be?
faq.answer: Supports nested objects, arrays, regex patterns, custom validators, and conditional validation logic.

faq.question: Can I integrate with existing APIs?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill generates API routes that fit standard REST patterns and can connect to any backend.

faq.question: Is my data safe with this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a prompt-based skill with no code execution. It only generates patterns locally.

faq.question: What if the form does not work?
faq.answer: Check that you have all dependencies installed: react-hook-form, @hookform/resolvers/zod, and Shadcn components.

faq.question: How is this different from manual coding?
faq.answer: Provides proven patterns, consistent structure, and best practices so you avoid common mistakes.
